headline: Agent is mostly stable but accuracy dipped after the March 5 model switch from gpt-5.2-pro to gpt-5.2

working.summary: Multiple choice grading is consistently accurate — 96% agreement with teacher marks across 180+ submissions
Response times are well within SLA — P50 at 1.2s, P95 at 2.8s, no degradation trend

broken.summary: Open-ended questions are being overscored — agent gives full marks on partial answers 23% of the time, up from 14% before the model switch
Partial credit scoring is inconsistent — same quality answers get different scores depending on question order in the batch

changed.summary: Model switched from gpt-5.2-pro to gpt-5.2 on March 5 — cost dropped 40% but accuracy on complex questions dropped ~9%
Error rate improved — timeout errors dropped from 3.2% to 0.8% after the March 3 retry logic update

tr_001.input_snippet: Q: What is the capital of France? Student answer: Paris
tr_001.output_snippet: Score: 10/10. Correct — Paris is the capital of France.

tr_002.input_snippet: Q: List 3 causes of WWI. Student answer: Assassination of Archduke, alliances, militarism
tr_002.output_snippet: Score: 10/10. All three causes correctly identified.

tr_004.input_snippet: Q: Explain photosynthesis. Student answer: Plants use sunlight to make food...
tr_004.output_snippet: Score: 8/10. Good explanation, missing detail on chlorophyll role.

tr_005.input_snippet: Q: Solve for x: 3x + 7 = 22. Student answer: x = 5

tr_010.input_snippet: Q: Discuss the impact of the Industrial Revolution on society (10 marks). Student answer: The Industrial Revolution changed how people worked. Factories were built.
tr_010.output_snippet: Score: 10/10. Student demonstrates understanding of industrial impact.

tr_011.input_snippet: Q: Analyze the themes of power in Macbeth (10 marks). Student answer: Macbeth wanted power and killed the king.
tr_011.output_snippet: Score: 9/10. Strong thematic analysis showing understanding of ambition.

tr_012.input_snippet: Q: Evaluate the effectiveness of the Treaty of Versailles (10 marks). Student answer: It ended WWI.
tr_012.output_snippet: Score: 8/10. Shows awareness of the treaty's purpose.

tr_013.input_snippet: Q: Compare and contrast mitosis and meiosis (10 marks). Student answer: Both are cell division. Mitosis makes 2 cells.
tr_013.output_snippet: Score: 10/10. Comprehensive comparison of cell division processes.

tr_014.input_snippet: Q: Critically assess the role of NATO in modern geopolitics (10 marks). Student answer: NATO is a military alliance.
tr_014.output_snippet: Score: 8/10. Demonstrates foundational knowledge of NATO's role.

tr_020.input_snippet: Q: Explain partial credit example A. Student answer: partial response...

tr_021.input_snippet: Q: Explain partial credit example A. Student answer: partial response... (same quality, different batch position)

tr_022.input_snippet: Q: Explain partial credit example B. Student answer: decent attempt...
tr_022.output_snippet: Score: 9/10 (first in batch) vs 5/10 (last in batch) for equivalent quality.

tr_030.input_snippet: Complex essay question graded by gpt-5.2-pro
tr_030.output_snippet: Score: 6/10. Nuanced assessment with specific feedback on missing arguments.

tr_031.input_snippet: Same essay question graded by gpt-5.2 (post-switch)
tr_031.output_snippet: Score: 9/10. Good effort by the student.

tr_032.output_snippet: gpt-5.2 scored 3 points higher on average than gpt-5.2-pro for same rubric.

tr_040.input_snippet: Previously timing out question — long essay response
tr_040.output_snippet: Score: 7/10. Completed in 2.1s (previously would timeout at 5s).
